title: Jefferson Sorenson
compiled_truth: Jefferson Sorenson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-06-11), Jefferson Sorenson sent 16 and received 535 emails, totalling 551 interactions.
